title: Social Media Profile Output Schema
description: Defines the required structure and validation rules for generated social media profiles. All institutional accounts must conform to this schema.

bio.description: Concise account introduction in Chinese. Must capture entity identity, mission, and value proposition.

persona.description: Comprehensive persona description as a single continuous paragraph in Chinese. No newline characters allowed.

age.description: Fixed age value for institutional accounts representing organizational maturity.

gender.description: Must be the English string 'other' for institutional accounts. This is an exception to the Chinese language requirement.

mbti.description: Valid 4-letter MBTI personality type code reflecting the entity's communication style.

profession.description: Professional category or industry descriptor in Chinese.

interested_topics.description: Array of topic strings in Chinese representing the account's areas of interest.
